CIVIL AVIATION (ROUTE CHARGES FOR
NAVIGATION SERVICES) REGULATIONS

[ L.S.333.01

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 333.01
CIVIL AVIATION (ROUTE CHARGES FOR
NAVIGATION SERVICES) REGULATIONS *
1 ta’ Jannar, 2003
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 386 tal-2002, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 434 tal2003, 515 tal-2004, 40 tal-2006, 22, 424 u 442 tal-2007, 142 tal-2008, 35
tal-2009, 56 tal-2010, 35 tal-2011, 67 tal-2012, 56 tal-2013, 8 tal-2014,
155 tal-2015, 55 tal-2016,198 tal-2017, 70 tal-2018, 27 tal-2019 u 37 tal2020, 9 tal-2021, 34 tal-2022 u 6 tal-2023 u bl-Att XL tal-2023.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ippubblikat bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
